title: tussilago caryophyllata
intro: Tussilago caryophyllata, also known as Coltsfoot, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, helping to ease respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Tussilago caryophyllata include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing sore throats, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Tussilago caryophyllata can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as in cough syrups and lozenges.
